summary: Tested all features from iteration 3 batch. Found and fixed critical bug: AIProfileScreen.tsx had missing function declaration for handleSaveAsNew (orphaned code), and SettingsScreen.tsx had duplicate 'userId' in destructuring. Both caused Vite 404 errors making the entire app render as blank white page. After fixes, all features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Missing 'const handleSaveAsNew = async () => {' declaration at line 381. handleSave closed at line 380, then orphaned code for create-copy-persona ran at module level, causing TS error 'Declaration or statement expected' at line 2204 and Vite 404 for the entire file.
FIXED: Duplicate 'userId' in useApp() destructuring (lines 33 and 44) caused TS error 'Cannot redeclare block-scoped variable userId' making the entire settings screen 404.

features_tested.settings_screen_loads: PASS - Loads without crash after fix
features_tested.firebase_inputs_typing: PASS - All 11 Firebase inputs accept typed text
features_tested.save_firebase_button: PASS - 'Save Firebase Configuration' button exists and clickable
features_tested.mongodb_import_button: PASS - Import label with file input exists (no data-testid on label element)
features_tested.elevenlabs_sliders: PASS - Stability, Similarity Boost, Style, Speaking Rate all present; Speaker Boost toggle present
features_tested.stability_ai_img2img: PASS - Image-to-Image section with Init Image upload visible
features_tested.backend_cartesia_401: PASS - POST /api/tts/cartesia returns 401 for bad key

notes: MongoDB Import button is a <label> element (not a <button>), so data-testid is missing. Could add data-testid to the label for testability.
The 'Strength' slider for img2img init image is not visible in the current view - may be hidden until an image is uploaded, which is expected behavior.
Voice engine tabs (ElevenLabs/Cartesia) only show after 'Enable Speech' toggle is ON - correct behavior.
action_items: Consider adding data-testid to MongoDB Import label element for future automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: AIProfileScreen.tsx was missing function declaration for handleSaveAsNew - this was the root cause of the blank white screen bug
SettingsScreen.tsx had duplicate userId destructuring - minor but caused compile error
updated_files: /app/src/screens/AIProfileScreen.tsx (added missing handleSaveAsNew function declaration at line 381)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is Node.js/Express + Vite at port 3000. All tested features now working. Critical bug was missing function declaration in AIProfileScreen.tsx causing app-wide blank screen. Fixed by adding 'const handleSaveAsNew = async () => {' at line 381. Voice engine tabs require Enable Speech toggle to be ON before they appear. MongoDB Import uses a <label> not a <button>. Stability AI img2img strength slider appears only after image upload.

rca_of_issue.bug: Entire app rendering as blank white screen
rca_of_issue.root_cause: AIProfileScreen.tsx had a missing 'const handleSaveAsNew = async () => {' function declaration. The code for create-copy-persona was orphaned between handleSave closing at line 380 and the next function at line 448. This caused esbuild/TypeScript error 'Unexpected }' at line 2204, making Vite return 404 for AIProfileScreen.tsx, which cascaded to the entire React bundle failing to load. SettingsScreen.tsx also had duplicate 'userId' in destructuring causing TS2451 error.
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added 'const handleSaveAsNew = async () => {' before orphaned code block; removed duplicate userId
